name: memory-safety
summary: Đảm bảo không có memory errors: buffer overflow, use-after-free, null deref. Rust borrow checker, GC, safe languages.

facts.text: GC: Java/Go/Python — không buffer overflow, không UAF
Rust borrow checker: memory safety không cần GC
C/C++: memory unsafe — CVE 70% từ memory safety issues
MISRA C/C++: coding standard giảm memory bugs trong embedded
